/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/nutriv.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/nutriv.dir/my_application.cc.o CMakeFiles/nutriv.dir/__/flutter/generated_plugin_registrant.cc.o -o ../intermediates_do_not_run/nutriv  -Wl,-rpath,/media/nando/TERA/NutriV/NutriV/nutriv/linux/plugins/file_selector_linux:/media/nando/TERA/NutriV/NutriV/nutriv/linux/plugins/gtk:/media/nando/TERA/NutriV/NutriV/nutriv/linux/plugins/url_launcher_linux:/media/nando/TERA/NutriV/NutriV/nutriv/linux/flutter/ephemeral: ../plugins/file_selector_linux/libfile_selector_linux_plugin.so ../plugins/gtk/libgtk_plugin.so ../plugins/url_launcher_linux/liburl_launcher_linux_plugin.so ../flutter/ephemeral/libflutter_linux_gtk.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtk-3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgdk-3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpangocairo-1.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpango-1.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libatk-1.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcairo-gobject.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcairo.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglib-2.0.so
